headline: Old-School Dividend-Paying Data Center REITs May Be the Best and Safest Technology Idea Now
summary: The AI buildout has quietly handed an unlikely group of old-school dividend payers a stranglehold on the physical infrastructure powering the boom, and Wall Street is starting to take notice. Three data center REITs are capturing that demand while paying shareholders along the way.
